hero.heading: Premium Bathroom Solutions. Delivered at Scale.
hero.subheading: Wholesale distribution for developers, designers, and retail partners.
hero.imageAlt: Luxury modern bathroom with freestanding bathtub and marble walls

about.heading: Trusted Source for Premium Bathroom Products
about.body1: For over a decade, Mavi has been the trusted wholesale partner for architects, designers, and developers seeking premium bathroom solutions. We source the finest fixtures and fittings from world-renowned manufacturers.
about.body2: Our commitment to quality extends beyond products — with dedicated account managers, reliable logistics, and one of the largest inventories in the industry, we ensure your projects are delivered on time and to specification.
about.body3: From boutique residential developments to large-scale hospitality projects, our team provides tailored solutions that meet the highest standards of design and functionality.

bulkPricing.title: Bulk Pricing
bulkPricing.desc: Competitive wholesale rates with volume-based discounts for all partners.

fastDelivery.title: Fast Delivery
fastDelivery.desc: Reliable logistics with expedited shipping options across all regions.

qualityControl.title: Quality Control
qualityControl.desc: Every product passes rigorous inspection before leaving our warehouse.

accountManagers.title: Account Managers
accountManagers.desc: Dedicated support to handle your orders, specifications, and timelines.

globalSourcing.title: Global Sourcing
globalSourcing.desc: Partnerships with leading manufacturers from Europe, Asia, and beyond.

customOrders.title: Custom Orders
customOrders.desc: Tailored solutions for unique project requirements and specifications.

sarahMitchell.quote: Mavi has been our go-to wholesale partner for three years. Their product quality and reliability are unmatched in the industry.
sarahMitchell.name: Sarah Mitchell
sarahMitchell.title: Head of Procurement

jamesChen.quote: The dedicated account management and fast turnaround on custom orders make them invaluable for our high-end hospitality projects.
jamesChen.name: James Chen
